name: PMR Live Matrix
query:
SELECT
    project_request_code as "Project Request Code",
    status as "Status",
    reason as "Manpower Type",
    project_allocation as "Project",
    designation as "Designation",
    nationality as "Nationality",
    gender as "Gender",
    count as "Total Qty",
    cancelled_qty as "Cancelled",
    managed_by_ot_qty as "Managed by OT",
    number_to_hire as "Number to Hire"
FROM
    `tabProject Manpower Request`
WHERE
    docstatus < 2
ORDER BY
    modified DESC
